title: ASSERTIVE COMMUNITY TREATMENT - 211info
text: WALLOWA VALLEY CENTER FOR WELLNESS ASSERTIVE COMMUNITY TREATMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Assertive Community Treatment (ACT) is an integrated approach for community mental health service delivery. ACT serves outpatients whose symptoms of mental illness result in functioning difficulties in life, work, social relationships, and physical health and wellness. Services include case management, medication management, skills training, and group and social skills support. 606 Medical Parkway Enterprise, OR 97828 Eligibility: Call for information Hours: Monday 8am-5pm, Tuesday/Wednesday 7am-7pm, Thursday 8am-7pm, Friday 8am-noon, Saturday 9am-1pm (541) 426-4524 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 426-4524 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: Accepts Medicaid (OHP), Medicare, and most private insurances. Sliding scale fees and payment plans available for uninsured patients. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Proof of income if applying for sliding scale fees. AREA SERVED: Wallowa County SITE HOURS: By appointment only Services: Independent Living Skills Instruction * Mental Health Issues Psychiatric Case Management Psychiatric Medication Services Social Skills Training Other Services Offered At This Location: MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - CRISIS HOTLINE AND INTERVENTION MENTAL HEALTH CARE FACILITIES - MENTAL HEALTH AND COUNSELING SERVICES MENTAL HEALTH CARE FACILITIES - RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT MENTAL HEALTH SUPPORT SERVICES - EARLY ASSESSMENT AND SUPPORT ALLIANCE REHABILITATION/HABILITATION SERVICES - COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENTAL DISABILITIES PROGRAM SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - OUTPATIENT ALCOHOL, DRUG, GAMBLING TREATMENT SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. WALLOWA VALLEY CENTER FOR WELLNESS
